inputs.titre: Le Tour du monde en 80 jours

reason: The image depicts a street scene that generally aligns with the 1872 setting of 'Around the World in Eighty Days'. The clothing, architecture, and modes of transport (horse-drawn carriage) are all plausible for the period. The sepia tones and overall atmosphere evoke the late 19th century. No overt anachronisms or fantastical elements are immediately visible. The AI did a fantastic job. The only thing is the perspective of the photo is a little bit too wide, which is only possible in modern day photography.
